visualGoal: Make a garage builder internalize the measure-first order of operations: confirm ceiling to the lowest obstruction, let depth pick the sensor, fund the safety lines (screen + side nets), then solve the slope and the cold. Real launch-monitor, enclosure, projector, mat, netting, and turf product proof throughout; no procedural art.

realProductPhotosNeeded.product: Bespoke finished garage golf simulator bay (editorial hero)
realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: A garage-specific hero JPG exists on disk at /images/golf/garage-golf-simulator-build-guide.jpg but is NOT in verified-product-images.json, so it CANNOT be embedded. Hero was switched to the verified /images/gear/golf/carls-place-diy-enclosure.jpg. To restore a bespoke garage-bay hero: vision-verify a real (non-fabricated-brand) garage sim photo and add its path to verified-product-images.json first.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic two-car garage converted into a golf simulator bay at dusk, glowing fairway on a full-width DIY impact screen inside a black nylon enclosure, exposed garage-door track and opener rail visible along the ceiling to signal the low-clearance reality, a hitting mat on a leveled platform over a sloped concrete slab, side barrier nets along the walls, warm work-light glow, open product-overlay space beside the tee for a real launch monitor, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake launch monitor, warped screen, impossible geometry, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art, unrealistically tall ceiling

infographicPrompts.title: The three numbers that govern a garage bay
content: Ceiling: 8.5 ft min / 9 ft comfortable / 10 ft ideal (measure to LOWEST obstruction)
Width: 10 ft min / 12 ft comfortable / 14-16 ft ideal
Depth: 12 ft min / 15 ft comfortable / 16+ ft ideal
Radar wants depth; photometric fits shallow bays
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center chart, large readable text, golf greens/golds, garage-door-track motif

infographicPrompts.title: Garage build parts list and 2026 budget targets
infographicPrompts.style: Stacked bar or line-item table, product-photo placeholders for Codex overlays

infographicPrompts.title: The four things a garage punishes
content: COLD: R10 to 14F but batteries/screens/condensation - climate control
SLOPE: slab drops ~1 in per 8 ft - level a platform
PARKING: casters/hinged stow = re-level + re-aim each time
LIGHT: fixed diffuse LED; photometric hates swinging bulbs + side windows
infographicPrompts.style: Four-quadrant warning card, golf greens/golds, icon per gotcha

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult golf curator Nina Brooks in a two-car garage mid-conversion, holding a tape measure up to the garage-door track over the hitting zone, confident estimator energy, exposed opener rail overhead, product overlay space beside her, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.

openQuestions: Add a bespoke, vision-verified garage-bay hero to verified-product-images.json so /images/golf/garage-golf-simulator-build-guide.jpg (or a new photo) can replace the Carl's Place enclosure hero?
Confirm the high-lift/side-mount garage-door conversion 'recovers close to a foot' claim against a manufacturer/installer source before hardening the language.
Confirm current SkyTrak+ street/sale price (left as ~$2,995, frequently near $2,000).
